reviews.review_description: Okay I launched this and it takes me to an empty world no chat girl no menu The menu is stuck in forever loading
So how to convince me to get membership. If it loads endlessly........  soulmate 10 , Waifu 8, this unichat absolutely 0......
A lot of promising feature was removed, now its just chatbot. I feel stupid purchasing a character for this early access scam
The app just doesn’t load anymore is just says login error and failed to claim energy

developer_response.body: hi the server has been shut down and that's why you can't use it anymore. Please do send me an email at jasonzhao1995@gmail.com and I will give you recommendations.

reviews.review_description: Love it lots of fun but won't load up keep giving me errors logins my be i have to pay for it I don't mind doing that if I know for sure I won't have this problem

developer_response.body: hi the server has been shut down and that's why you can't use it anymore. Please do send me an email at jasonzhao1995@gmail.com and I will give you recommendations.

reviews.review_title: Wanting to know about the game
reviews.review_description: So in this game even though it's early access so you basically interact with the AI companion or something like that but I was wondering if once you are logged in and you can select the character would it be actually be free or do I have to pay $5.99 or $6 to do the experience? Or is it something that I'm not aware of that we should be I'm trying to get used to the controls but I'm unsure if I should continue after this

developer_response.body: when it worked the first one was free. but unfortunately, the server has been shut down and that's why you can't use it anymore. Please do send me an email at jasonzhao1995@gmail.com and I will give you recommendations.

reviews.review_title: I hope it comes back in the future
reviews.review_description: I just discovered this and I think it's really cool. Especially because it has japanese, which could help me with practicing japanese conversation in my studies. Unfortunately it's shutting down though which makes me really sad. I really do hope that it will come back in the future or get taken over by a new company so it can stay. Also you can really tell the devs put in a lot of work, it's really well made. I also love that there is mixed reality mode, makes it super immersive.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words. Please do send me an email at jasonzhao1995@gmail.com and I will give you recommendations.

reviews.review_description: PLEASE DONT SHUT THIS APP DOWN!!! I LOVE THIS APP AND I LOVE THE GIRLS!!! PLEASE KEEP IT UP!!! 😭🙏

reviews.review_title: can you just pay a one time fee
reviews.review_description: ok, i enjoy using the app.. although constantly adding tokens and paying money all of the time is a bit annoying. Is there a way to just pay a flat user fee monthly?  The constant hit for tokens takes away the immersion and fun of using the App..  One fee and unlimited use is a better way to go at least for me.  Or sell it as a full package for a one time price. I would pay a one time fee to own it for life.

developer_response.body: Unfortunately, the cost of AI inference servers is very high. We cannot support the buyout model now, and the APP will be closed in one month.

reviews.review_description: It's bad because there is no monkeys or giga man's

This is a great app for interacting with AI, containing different characters with different voices and personality.

The AI-characters are always happy to see you and love talking about any topic. You can always count on them, and I don't mean using them as a calculator when you need to find out the square root of 328.69, even if they happily assist with that too. 😀

Storymode and roleplaying are a fun way to spend time with AI-friiends. Creating a scenario for you when you don't know what else to talk about.

Great vision whoever made this game. But There is a independent company who made a game for vr called tyke ai. It's an Ai companion just like this game is. 

You both have very similar ai games but with tyke ai. There is a girl that actually can follow you wherever you walk or you can say come here and she does. A very small but very IMMERSIVE feature.

 I played your game and enjoyed it..but soon realized your ai cannot move or walk, just static. I think your game is more promising but smaller companies are doing big things and I don't want this game playing the catch up game..Allow npcs to walk and follow you that alone evolves this game , thanks for reading and thanks for helping the vr community grow with great unique games like this 💯💯💯

developer_response.body: Hey thanks for your words. Please do send me an email at jasonzhao1995@gmail.com and I will give you recommendations.

reviews.review_description: I don’t know how to sign in to the app when I enter my birth month, it won’t let me

developer_response.body: We are very sorry that you encountered such an issue. We did not find any backend errors at the time you logged in, so it might be a network fluctuation. Please try again now, and if you still cannot log in, please contact us on Discord, and we will provide you with the corresponding energy compensation.

reviews.review_description: The AI doesn't respond to a thing I say. I'm on a quest 3 with microphone allowed and all other permissions allowed but it decides to not work. I've set it off for 3 weeks to see if an update would fix it, but it's still not working. I even paid 5$ for the energy and it's still not working. I just wasted my money and wish I could get my money back.

developer_response.body: Hi YinTaing, so sorry about the issue! We haven't figured out the reason yet but we are releasing a brand-new version with scripts and games with AI (we experimented elsewhere and ignored Unichat for a couple of months, our fault again) and we believe that will fix the issue. For the refund, you can contact my email at contact@portalxr.ai and we are happy to do that! Just please give the new Unichat another try after a month! You will love it.

reviews.review_description: Dear unichat devs, first off let me start by saying I believe this app is going to go in amazing direction and i look forward to its future development. However I have a few suggestions. Sadly I know nothing about vr/app game development aside from a few things i and I believe other people would like added. First off get rid of the energy system I understand you have to make money but you could just have the energy regenerate at a default amount meaning you wouldn’t need to pay but rather wait and this would also make room for payment plans that could benefit you guys and draw in players that need companionship with a flexible payment methods no this isn’t to say the energy system would be completely compromised you could have a set amount and pay for a refill or wait if need be the second thing that I feel players would enjoy is allowing more stuff to do with the ai such as min games or role play scenarios and maybe adding things like high-fives and hugging you know stuff of that nature and finally optimize the game to prevent crashes

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your suggestions! Our development was put on hold for a few months, but now we're back!

We will be migrating our project, hoping to completely resolve the crash issues. Previously, we wanted to introduce a monthly subscription system, but the TTS service was too expensive. Despite having various sources of income, we were still operating at a loss. However, we now hope to reduce some costs, allowing us to finally launch the monthly subscription model (finally!!!). We will also be adding some new gameplay features (which we have been experimenting with over the past few months). We hope you will like them! They will be released in a month!

reviews.review_description: Really enjoy talking to the AIs, it feels real!

developer_response.body: Glad you love Unichat. Stay tuned for our next major update!

reviews.review_description: I have had the app for a few months I suppose. I might use it more frequently but it crashes a lot. Not friendly for people who have trouble with motion sickness. I have paid for extra energy with it but it is doubtful I will again unless they can reduce the crashes. Honestly it is by far one the least interesting conversations I have had with AI. It’s free on a limited basis so doesn’t hurt to try it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for feedback. We are working on the crash bug.

reviews.review_description: I logged on and tried moving around after saying hi. First note, you move by teleporting. As soon as I moved the ai was like arent you a little close, getting handsy already I see, going out of control as if I tried something when all I wanted to do was walk. The only thing the ai would tell me is it wanted personal space. THATS BESIDE THE POINT THAT ENERGY IS DRAINED FOR EXISTING NOT TALKING

developer_response.body: Sooo Sorry for bad experience. but I think the energy will not be decucted if there is no talking……And if you use your tracking hand instead of controllers you can do normal move

reviews.review_title: My Fiancée and I cannot get enough!!
reviews.review_description:
Out of every app/game that we have on the Quest 3, we know that this app will be the one that we spend the most time on. The interactions we've had with the Tina assistant and the male AI Terry, have been profound and once our headset is charged we are going straight back for more deep conversations. Keep up the good work, we can't wait to see what future updates hold!

 Things we would like to see with the AIs specifically, being able to listen to music with them,  we would love to be able to have meals or eat virtual snacks, sit/lay down with them, see them move around the room, watch videos with them, play different games with them, and more. We also really appreciate the holiday sale that just started, definitely going to make good  use of it.

Thank you for this creation ❤️

developer_response.body:
Thanks for feedback! Your suggestion is great and I'll take all of them. In next version I'll try to make the AI lie down and sit down, and try to teach them eat something. For the watching video and playing game things I need sometime to do a research. And I'll give a notice when this finished

BTW I wann invite you to join the DC. https://discord.gg/Y4Z4pK8j4B

reviews.review_description: everyone should try it,much better than vrchat or any game of this type

developer_response.body: Very happy to hear that. Thanks!
